segments.text: To the choirmaster. A Maskil of the Sons of Korah.
O God, we have heard with our ears, our fathers have told us, what deeds you performed in their days, in the days of old
segments.speaker: Sons of Korah

segments.text: You with your own hand drove out the nations, but you planted them; you afflicted the peoples, but you set them free
segments.speaker: Sons of Korah

segments.text: For not by their own sword did they win the land, nor did their own arm save them, but your right hand and your arm, and the light of your face, for you delighted in them
segments.speaker: Sons of Korah

segments.text: You are my King, O God; ordain salvation for Jacob
segments.speaker: Sons of Korah

segments.text: Through you we push down our foes; through your name we tread down those who rise up against us
segments.speaker: Sons of Korah

segments.text: For not in my bow do I trust, nor can my sword save me
segments.speaker: Sons of Korah

segments.text: But you have saved us from our foes and have put to shame those who hate us
segments.speaker: Sons of Korah

segments.text: In God we have boasted continually, and we will give thanks to your name forever
segments.speaker: Sons of Korah

segments.text: Yet you have rejected us and disgraced us and have not gone out with our armies
segments.speaker: Sons of Korah

segments.text: You have made us turn back from the foe, and those who hate us have gotten spoil
segments.speaker: Sons of Korah

segments.text: You have given us up like sheep to be eaten and have scattered us among the nations
segments.speaker: Sons of Korah

segments.text: You have sold your people for a trifle, demanding no high price for them
segments.speaker: Sons of Korah

segments.text: You have made us a reproach to our neighbors, a mockery and a derision to those around us
segments.speaker: Sons of Korah

segments.text: You have made us a byword among the nations, a laughingstock among the peoples
segments.speaker: Sons of Korah

segments.text: All day long my disgrace is before me, and shame has covered my face
segments.speaker: Sons of Korah

segments.text: At the words of the taunters and revilers, because of the enemy and the avenger
segments.speaker: Sons of Korah

segments.text: All this has come upon us, though we have not forgotten you, and we have not been false to your covenant
segments.speaker: Sons of Korah

segments.text: Our heart has not turned back, nor have our steps departed from your way
segments.speaker: Sons of Korah

segments.text: Yet you have broken us in the place of jackals and covered us with deep darkness
segments.speaker: Sons of Korah

segments.text: If we had forgotten the name of our God or spread out our hands to a foreign god
segments.speaker: Sons of Korah

segments.text: Would not God discover this? For he knows the secrets of the heart
segments.speaker: Sons of Korah

segments.text: Yet for your sake we are killed all the day long; we are regarded as sheep to be slaughtered
segments.speaker: Sons of Korah

segments.text: Awake! Why are you sleeping, O Lord? Rouse yourself! Do not reject us forever!
segments.speaker: Sons of Korah

segments.text: Why do you hide your face? Why do you forget our affliction and oppression?
segments.speaker: Sons of Korah

segments.text: For our soul is bowed down to the dust; our belly clings to the ground
segments.speaker: Sons of Korah
